hook.text: Struggling at work with endometriosis? Here's a resource that can help
hook.target_audience_raw: Women with endometriosis who are employed or seeking workplace accommodations

main_claim.text: Endometriosis UK has an employer resource to help advocate for workplace accommodations.

supporting_explanation.summary: The resource lists specific accommodations like requesting the right chair, working from home on bad days, a parking spot closer, rest breaks, and support around fatigue and nutrition.

funnel_rationale: Raises awareness of a resource available to endometriosis patients without prompting specific medical action; top-of-funnel education.
format_raw: talking head with on-screen text list
